verses.3: “But draw near here, you sons of a sorceress,
verses.5: you who inflame yourselves among the oaks,
verses.6: Among the smooth stones of the valley is your portion.
verses.7: On a high and lofty mountain you have set your bed.
verses.8: You have set up your memorial behind the doors and the posts,
verses.9: You went to the king with oil,
verses.10: You were wearied with the length of your ways;
verses.14: He will say, “Build up, build up, prepare the way!
verses.15: For the high and lofty One who inhabits eternity,
verses.16: For I will not contend forever, neither will I always be angry;
verses.17: I was angry because of the iniquity of his covetousness and struck him.
verses.18: I have seen his ways, and will heal him.
verses.19: I create the fruit of the lips:
verses.20: But the wicked are like the troubled sea;
verses.21: “There is no peace”, says my God,
